title: Colgate-Palmolive India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Colgate-Palmolive India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Colgate-Palmolive India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Colgate-Palmolive India:
Colgate-Palmolive India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India!
